sidebar.title: Smart Organizer
sidebar.dependency_check_hint: Run this only when you need to inspect optional runtime tools.
sidebar.upload_limits: Upload limits: per file {file_size}, per batch {batch_size}

malware.enable_scan: Require a compatible clean malware result before moving or restoring files
malware.status_freshclam_missing: freshclam was not found, so Smart Organizer cannot update the virus database
malware.freshclam_ready: freshclam is available for manual updates.
malware.infected_warning: This file was marked infected by ClamAV. Smart Organizer will not move, delete, or open it. Please handle it with your antivirus software.
malware.blocked_warning: This file is not confirmed clean ({status}). Smart Organizer will skip it until the virus and malware check is clean.
malware.selected_infected_warning: Selected infected files will be skipped and not moved: {files}
malware.selected_blocked_warning: Selected files with blocked scan status will be skipped and not moved: {files}

header.subtitle: Run organization analysis and malware checks separately while keeping the main page compact.

settings.summary_description: Organization analysis and security settings are applied together only after you save.
settings.summary_inline: Mode {scan_mode} | Malware {malware_status} | Subfolders {subfolders} | Unused {days} days | Large {large_mb} MB | Max {max_files}
settings.organization_summary_inline: Subfolders {subfolders} | Unused {days} days | Large {large_mb} MB | Max {max_files} | Duplicate detection {duplicate_detection}
settings.no_auto_move_delete: Scanning only analyzes and previews. It does not automatically move or delete files.
settings.dialog_description: Edit draft settings here. Use Save to apply everything at once.

hero.title: Smart File Organization Assistant
hero.subtitle: Preview first, quarantine before deleting, and safely spot stale or oversized files.

help.scan: Scan a folder to identify stale, oversized, duplicate-like, or temporary files.
help.preview: Preview the selected candidates before moving anything.
help.quarantine: Move files into quarantine first so you can restore them later.
help.restore: Use the organization staging card to restore quarantined files or export reports.

dialogs.warnings_empty: No warnings were reported for this scan.
dialogs.paths_empty: No candidate paths are selected right now.

home.safety_notice: This tool never deletes files directly. Every organization action moves files into quarantine first, and you can restore them later.

process.step1_desc: Enter a folder path and start scanning to see which files may need attention.
process.step2_desc: Review the suggestions and reasons before deciding what to act on.
process.step3_desc: Files are moved to quarantine first instead of being deleted.
process.step4_desc: You can restore files later or export Markdown and CSV reports.

scan.title: Scan Folder
scan.description: This page only analyzes and previews. It does not automatically move or delete anything.
scan.primary_action_secure: Start secure scan and organization analysis
scan.permission_denied: Permission denied while scanning this folder.
scan.status_empty: Enter a folder path to begin a focused one-page scan.
scan.empty: No scan results yet. Enter a folder path and click the action button first.

malware_action.title: Virus and malware scan
malware_action.description: Run only the virus and malware check without organization analysis.
malware_action.progress: Virus and malware scan in progress... processed {count} files

organization_action.title: Organization analysis
organization_action.description: Run only the organization analysis without automatically starting the malware check.
organization_action.summary: Unused {days} days | Large {large_mb} MB | Subfolders {subfolders} | Max {max_files} | Duplicate detection {duplicate_detection}
organization_action.progress: Organization analysis in progress... inspected {count} files
organization_action.empty: No organization analysis results yet. Run organization analysis first.

malware_result.empty: No virus and malware scan results yet.

conclusion.infected: Infected files were found. Do not treat this folder as clean.
conclusion.suspicious: Suspicious files were found in {count} item(s). Review them carefully.
conclusion.incomplete: Scan coverage was incomplete. Do not treat the whole folder as clean yet.
conclusion.clean: All considered files completed and came back clean.

malware_result.coverage: Mode {mode} | Coverage {coverage} | Recursive {recursive} | Max files {max_files} | Truncated {truncated}
malware_result.no_blocked: No suspicious or infected files were found.
malware_result.no_incomplete: No incomplete scan rows were recorded.

analysis_result.summary_inline: Unused {unused} | Large {large} | Duplicate files {duplicate_files} | Reviewable space {reclaimable}
analysis_result.review_notice: These organization candidates need human review. They are not a malware safety approval.
analysis_result.duplicate_enabled: Duplicate detection was enabled for this analysis.
analysis_result.duplicate_disabled: Duplicate detection was disabled for this analysis pass.
analysis_result.max_files_warning: Analysis stopped after the configured maximum of {count} files.
analysis_result.no_rows: No rows to show for this category.

candidates.title: Candidate Files
candidates.empty: This folder currently has no stale or oversized files matching your scan settings.
candidates.limit_warning: Showing the first {shown} candidates out of {total} to keep the table responsive. Selection is preserved for hidden candidates.
candidates.hidden_selection_summary: {selected} hidden candidate(s) remain selected outside the visible table (hidden total: {hidden}).
candidates.confirm_quarantine: I understand these files will move into `.smart_organizer_quarantine/` first and can be restored later.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.empty_largest: No large-file items to show yet.
dashboard.empty_stale: No stale-file items to show yet.

quarantine.title: Organization Staging & Restore
quarantine.description: Organization staging is a safe holding area, not deletion. You can restore files whenever needed.
quarantine.empty: There are no staged files to restore for this folder.

upload.title: Upload Analysis
upload.description: Upload PDFs, images, or videos and the app will try to extract text, previews, and classification suggestions.
upload.limit_summary: Upload limits: per file {file_size}, per batch {batch_size}.
upload.batch_guidance: Batch guidance: analysis keeps uploads in memory, so smaller batches are easier to review. Current batch limit: {size}.
upload.empty: No files uploaded yet. Upload a PDF, image, or video to begin analysis.
upload.ready: Ready to analyze {count} file(s), total size {size}.
upload.large_batch_warning: This batch may take a while because several large files are queued together.
upload.continue_to_review: Analyzed {count} file(s). Continue to Review Results.
upload.no_results: No files were analyzed this time. Check the errors above for details.
upload.limit_file: {name}: file size {size} exceeds the per-file limit of {max_size}.
upload.limit_batch: Batch size {size} exceeds the upload batch limit of {max_size}. Upload fewer or smaller files at once.

review.title: Review Results
review.description: Check the classification, summary, and preview before sending files into the organization flow.
review.empty: No analysis results yet. Start from Upload Analysis first.
review.invalid_format: Analysis results have an unexpected format.
review.video_thumbnail_unavailable: No video thumbnail is currently available.
review.degraded_warning: Some analysis steps were degraded or fell back safely.
review.scanned_warning: This document may be scanned; OCR or fallback extraction was used.
review.enable_ai_first: Enable AI summary in settings first.
review.confirm_success: Reviewed files are ready for Execute Organization.

execute.title: Execute Organization
execute.description: Move confirmed files into the organized destination by category.
execute.empty: No confirmed items yet. Review the analysis results first.
execute.partial_success: Organized {success_count} item(s). Kept {failed_count} failed item(s) in the pending list for retry.

search_records.title: Search & Records
search_records.description: Look up previous analysis, classification, and organization results.
search_records.search_empty: No search yet. Enter a keyword to look through previous analysis records.
search_records.search_no_results: No matching organization records were found.
search_records.download_unavailable: This file cannot be downloaded safely right now.
search_records.search_index_failed: Search index failed. Try rebuilding records in Organization Records.
search_records.no_final_path: Record has no organized file path.
search_records.invalid_path: Record contains an invalid file path.
search_records.path_outside_repo: Record path is outside the repository and cannot be downloaded.
search_records.file_missing: The organized file is no longer available on disk.
search_records.records_empty: No matching organization records were found.
search_records.records_reset_hint: Clear the search or reset the filters to bring records back into view.
search_records.maintenance_hint: Use reclassify when a record needs a fresh metadata-based topic assignment.
search_records.reclassify_missing_file: The file is no longer available on disk. Refresh locations first.
search_records.reclassify_unavailable: Reclassify becomes available after records are loaded. Refresh and rebuild remain available.
search_records.unfinished_no_actions: No recovery actions are available for this record.
search_records.unfinished_discard_confirm: I understand this will remove the unfinished database record and approved temporary files.
search_records.unfinished_discard_partial: Record was removed, but some temporary cleanup failed: {errors}
